veo-3-1.name: Google Veo 3.1
veo-3-1.what: Turns a text prompt or image into realistic video with sound.
veo-3-1.weak_at: Less manual control than a full studio tool.

higgsfield.name: Higgsfield
higgsfield.what: An all-in-one AI video studio — generate, animate, edit, direct.
higgsfield.best_for: Creators who want camera control plus a full workflow in one place.
higgsfield.weak_at: More to learn than a one-click tool.

synthesia.name: Synthesia
synthesia.what: Makes talking-head videos with AI avatars.
synthesia.best_for: Corporate training and explainers without filming.
synthesia.weak_at: Not for cinematic or creative video.

sources.label: That Works Media — best AI video tools 2026

zapier.name: Zapier
zapier.what: Connects your apps and automates tasks between them, no code.
zapier.best_for: The easiest glue, with the most integrations.
zapier.weak_at: Complex logic gets pricey vs node-based tools.

sources.label: n8n — best AI workflow automation tools

make.name: Make
make.what: Visual drag-and-drop builder for multi-step automations.
make.best_for: Complex branching flows you can see and tune.

sources.label: Vellum — top low-code AI workflow automation tools

figma.name: Figma (+ Figma Make)
figma.what: Design UI collaboratively; turn prompts into layouts and even code.
figma.weak_at: Overkill for quick one-off social graphics.

canva.name: Canva Magic Studio
canva.what: Easy drag-and-drop design with AI for social and marketing.
canva.best_for: Fast branded visuals with no design degree.
canva.weak_at: Less precise vector control than pro tools.

sources.label: Upskillist — best AI graphic design tools

jobs.label: Automation
jobs.why_number_one: Most integrations on the market and the easiest to start — the glue for your whole stack.

jobs.label: Video creation
jobs.why_number_one: Best all-round quality — strong prompt adherence, realism, and built-in audio.

jobs.label: Graphic design
jobs.why_number_one: Goes from a text prompt to real UI layouts and even production-ready code, inside the tool teams already use.
